items.reviewerNotes: Exact road-marking image; source option order puts horizontal deceleration marking at A.
Exact U-turn-ahead guide-arrow image; source option order maps the correct answer to B.
Blue priority-over-oncoming sign: actual sign means the oncoming driver must yield. Source extracted key A conflicts with the sign image.
Exact blue bicycle sign; source D (bicycle lane) maps to the master meaning special bicycle/non-motorized lane.
Exact yellow broken-line bus-lane image; top candidates were bus signs, but q0886 matches the road marking.
Exact blue chevron line-guide signs; source option order maps line guide signs to B.
Option set matches q0430; source C is the insurance label/sticker option, corresponding to q0430 canonical D after reordering. Extracted key A is not supported.
Acceleration lane / expressway-entry speed question; source option order puts 60 km/h at D.
Exact traffic-light image; source option order maps prohibited from passing to B.
Exact central-circle road marking image; source option C is central circle. Extracted source key A conflicts.
Exact Y002 road-number sign; Y/township road corresponds to the source village-road option D.
Exact "80" road marking; master-bank meaning is minimum speed limit 80. Source extracted D conflicts.
Exact blue left one-way sign; source option A maps to q0817 one-way-left meaning.
Exact directional/destination sign; source option D is the directional-sign answer.
Actual image is the U-turn lane sign; top q0755 is a similar lane sign but not the same meaning. Source B is U-turn lane.
Exact longitudinal/vertical deceleration marking image; source option C maps to q0834 canonical vertical deceleration marking.
Prompt and personal-document option set align with q0517; source B is driver's license. q0379 is related but has vehicle/insurance document options.
